stemHtml: What is correct regarding Clear Air Turbulence?

options.a: It is found mainly above the tropopause and essentially a vertical wind shear associated with differing movement of air between two air masses.
options.b: It is an unpredictable variation in air movement which is not accompanied by any warnings of clouds.
options.c: It is mainly associated with stratus clouds and it is found at lower levels.
options.d: It is mainly associated with inversions and ground fog.
